notes: The 2026-07-23 full application review produced a prioritized findings list; this release is Wave A — every finding where the fix is a correctness or honesty repair (P0.3, P0.5–P0.9, P1.3–P1.6, P3.3, P3.4). Wave B (structural: write serialization, route extraction, CI guards, scripted publish) follows. - One discount rate for the basket (P0.5). DCF, EPV, EVA, Monte Carlo and scenarios previously split between the flat operating-model wacc_pct driver and the floored-CAPM cost of equity — two models could disagree purely because they read different rates. The context now exposes a memoised disco
